channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-14 11:45 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Finally we're going to get shots of Starship from a deployed payload:
item.description: Finally we're going to get shots of Starship from a deployed payload:

item.title: @elonmusk: SPACEX: Marmac 31 "You'll Thank Me Later" now has a cover installed. This barge will transport the S...
item.description: SPACEX: Marmac 31 "You'll Thank Me Later" now has a cover installed. This barge will transport the Super Heavy Boosters from Starbase to the Cape.

item.title: @elonmusk: I’m not mocking her masculinity. I’m denying its existence.
item.description: I’m not mocking her masculinity. I’m denying its existence.

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX is officially my fav art account now
item.description: SpaceX is officially my fav art account now

item.title: @elonmusk: On my way to Beijing in Air Force One
item.description: On my way to Beijing in Air Force One

item.title: @elonmusk: Less than one hour until Falcon 9’s launch of Dragon’s 34th Commercial Resupply Services mission to ...
item.description: Less than one hour until Falcon 9’s launch of Dragon’s 34th Commercial Resupply Services mission to the@Space_Station. Teams continue to monitor weather, which is currently 10% favorable for liftoff at 6:50 p.m. ET →spacex.com/launches/crs-34

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink is the top reason to fly United. It immediately makes every flight ten times better *and it...
item.description: Starlink is the top reason to fly United. It immediately makes every flight ten times better *and it's free*.

item.title: @elonmusk: posting on 𝕏 30,000 ft in the air all thanks to@Starlink@United🫶
item.description: posting on 𝕏 30,000 ft in the air all thanks to@Starlink@United🫶

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk with NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang, Apple CEO Tim Cook, President Trump, Chinese President Xi Ji...
item.description: Elon Musk with NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang, Apple CEO Tim Cook, President Trump, Chinese President Xi Jinping, and members of the U.S. delegation in Beijing.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.3 is better than people think.
item.description: Grok 4.3 is better than people think.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.3 is next level. I've been using it quite a bit for everything.
item.description: Grok 4.3 is next level. I've been using it quite a bit for everything.

item.title: @elonmusk: Voice Cloning is now live via the xAI API! Create a custom voice in less than 2 minutes or select fr...
item.description: Voice Cloning is now live via the xAI API! Create a custom voice in less than 2 minutes or select from our library of 80+ voices across 28 languages to personalize your voice agents, audiobooks, video game characters, and more.x.ai/news/grok-custom-voices
